# Workspace Instructions

- Build the app as a minimal but production-style RAG system.
- Use Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase pgvector, and Gemini embeddings/chat.
- Keep retrieval grounded and expose retrieved chunks in the UI.
- Prefer small, well-layered files in `src/lib/rag`, `src/app/api`, and `src/components`.
- Keep README focused on architecture, chunking strategy, embedding model, vector search, and deployment.
